title: Aurora, 15901, Dr. Seuss The Grinch, 18In, Soft Toy, Green, 18'
features: From the best-selling children's book How the Grinch Stole Christmas by author Dr. Seuss
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
The Grinch can sit up right thanks to his bean filled bottom
description: Product Description From the best-selling children's book author Dr. Seuss and the movies "How the Grinch stole Christmas ", we bring you the troublesome creation, The Grinch. With almost 70 million books sold worldwide, the Grinch is a trademark character loved by people of all ages. Now you can show your love for the loveable green creature with a little help from this wonderful plush. The Grinch has a super soft plush material body with floppy legs and arms. He has beans in his bottom which allows him to sit perfectly, with embroidered accents, he is the perfect gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Remove hand tags before giving to a child. Hand wash only
